pageContext.name: Superman Classic 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The MAN OF STEEL™ returns on a visually stunning engraved 1oz silver coin whose design heroes SUPERMAN™ in two poses. Frosted finishing of his powerful poses contrasts beautifully against a mirror background incorporating the iconic S shield. As legal tender, the effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse.  This coin is beautifully engraved and shows SUPERMAN posing powerfully. This traditional 1oz silver incorporates him in flight. This is an impressive collectible, comprising themed packaging to match.   Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in its limited mintage. Laser your focus and fly in fast - these are going to be super-limited and super-demanded!
